calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Vijay Patel is not present. Sanjay Patel, son of plaintiff, is present.
Arnold Walter Evje appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Jaishiri Tulsi is present.
Allison Stone representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 68 Sixth Street #27, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of 4/13/09 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Don Sullivan, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
